_comment: HTTP 404. Triggered by passing a model name that doesn't exist or that the account has no access to. Same shape for missing-access on a real model.

error.message: The model or endpoint seedance-fake-9999 does not exist or you do not have access to it. Request id: 02177937557393449d9e4e345fff0a9cbe1dfa11f8e7ca030e500
